caveat: The reported helpful case is an output-repair artifact: the stored frontier candidate is not gold-correct, so this rule requires another traced validation before any real-model pilot expansion.
rationale: Preserves the single reported helpful v1 override while blocking both reported harmful overrides by refusing to override when the external_l1_max incumbent answer already appears in the traced candidate pool.

reported_surface_metrics.description: Recommended v2: multi-branch/multi-family frontier, weak direct reserve, and external incumbent absent from traced support.

rule.base: apply as stricter filter on top of v1; never adds overrides
